title: Architectural Supervisor
description:
1. Attend to all daily subcontractors meeting to discuss daily structure and architectural issues in order to meet the project target schedule.
  2. Check the site progress and safety compliance of the subcontractors and report the findings to the immediate superior and safety officer.
  3. Check the subcontractors’ works are done accordance to the approved drawings/ details and take remedial actions for non-conformance.
  4. Equipped with the knowledge to conduct daily activities inspections with the project RE or RTO and take actions to clear their comments to ensure that the works are approved for commencement.
  5. Keep proper records of the inspection forms for future reference and submit as evidence for legal issue arising from unforeseen future defects.
  6. Show added confidence when dealing with general workers or subcontractors and peers, when in doubt to always seek consultation with senior site staff and to understand contractors contractual obligation and practice mutual respect at all levels.
  7. Strive to achieve fast and efficient approval for all assignments and always be vigilant with keen observation to put into practice BCA good practice in all aspects of work on site.
  8. Participate in assisting the Environmental Health Safety program set by the PM and WSHO that will contribute to a safe and clean site.
  9. Make effort to upgrade oneself to meet / exceed present standards through attendance of construction courses by BCA or equivalent institutions and also study on cost saving methods that are feasible for site usage.
  10. Able to accept additional work that form part of the project team’s own work activities which will assist in cost saving.
  11. Provide Guidance to new / fresh site supervisor that join the company to ensure seamless integration to the team without affecting the site progress.
  12. You may required to work varied hours or late night work as may be necessary for the proper performance of your duties.

postedCompany.description: Nakano Singapore (Pte) Ltd is one of the leading main contractors in Singapore with over 40 years of experience in building construction. We are inviting motivated and independent team player to join our company.
postedCompany.name: NAKANO SINGAPORE (PTE) LTD
